description:
Kling Lip Sync.

Provide a video with a visible face and an audio file.
The app automatically identifies faces and applies lip-sync.

video.description: Source video with a visible face. Formats: mp4, mov.
video.title: Video

audio.description: Audio file to drive lip sync. Formats: mp3, wav, m4a, aac. Max 5MB, 2-60 seconds.
audio.title: Audio

sound_volume.description: Volume of the lip-sync audio (0-2, default 2).
sound_volume.title: Sound Volume

original_audio_volume.description: Volume of the original video audio (0-2, default 2). Set to 0 to mute original.
original_audio_volume.title: Original Audio Volume

sound_end_time.description: Audio crop end point in milliseconds. The cropped audio must not exceed video duration. If not set, uses the video duration.
sound_end_time.title: Sound End Time

title: AppInput
